response.justification: Bogdan has a strong 15+ year engineering career with genuine staff-level credibility, TypeScript depth, and recent exposure to agentic tooling (MCP code generators at re:cinq). However, the role demands 8+ years building production AI solutions, and the candidate's AI work is limited to a single role that began in April 2025. Python — the primary language for the AI/ML ecosystem and explicitly required — is absent from the skills list entirely. There is no evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks, which are core competencies for this position.
strengths: Broad staff-level engineering background spanning 15+ years with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud (AWS CDK) across multiple production systems
Direct, current involvement in MCP (Model Context Protocol) infrastructure and agentic workflow tooling at re:cinq
Demonstrated ability to handle high-throughput data integration (millions of HTTP req/s at Dunnhumby), relevant to pipeline work
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the skills list — a critical gap given it is the lingua franca of the AI/ML stack this role requires
No evidence of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation/observability, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, etc.)
AI solution experience appears limited to a single role started April 2025; the role requires 8+ years of production AI delivery

key_factors.factor: No RAG / vector DB / LLM experience
Recent MCP and agentic workflow contribution
